page: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs running at 2.3 GHz with a 1:2 core-to-memory ratio, providing 128 GB of RAM. The architecture is x86_64, utilizing KVM virtualization. Local storage consists of a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface delivers an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth alongside one complimentary public IPv4 address.

In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates top-tier multi-core performance, ranking in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core CPU, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU tests. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is highly efficient, also placing in the top 10%, while large block read and write speeds remain strong. It excels in parallelized workloads, as evidenced by top-tier results in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, software compilation with Clang, and ray tracing.

Given the 2 GB of RAM per core, this server is highly optimized for compute-heavy tasks rather than memory-intensive databases, though it achieves top-tier performance in Redis SET operations and PassMark database benchmarks. It is well-suited for high-throughput web serving, software compilation, parallel data processing, and medium-scale LLM prompt processing. However, text generation speeds for LLMs are average, and it lacks GPU acceleration, making it unsuitable for heavy deep learning training.
description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server instance featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores running at 2.3 GHz, paired with 128 GB of RAM and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under KVM virtualization, this instance delivers an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data highlights top-tier multi-core CPU performance, placing in the top 10% for multi-threaded operations, software compilation, and database tasks. While single-core performance and large-block memory bandwidth are strong, the 2 GB of RAM per core represents a tradeoff for memory-bound applications. This server is highly suited for compute-intensive workloads such as parallel data processing, software compilation, high-throughput web serving, and Redis-based caching, offering high resource density and compute efficiency without GPU acceleration.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for parallel processing.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-128 is a compute-optimized server with 64 AMD EPYC Milan cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, built for high-throughput workloads.
tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized instance featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and local NVMe storage for demanding parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores with 128 GB of system memory
400 GB local NVMe SSD storage and 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier multi-core CPU and software compilation benchmark performance
Excellent throughput for Redis operations and static web serving
Optimized for parallel processing, CI/CD pipelines, and compute-heavy workloads
